info.title: TransitOps API
info.description: Smart Transport Operations Platform — backend API

vehicleId.description: Must currently be in the dispatch-eligible pool (status AVAILABLE)

driverId.description: Must currently be in the dispatch-eligible pool (status AVAILABLE, license not expired)

endOdometerKm.description: Final odometer reading; must exceed the start odometer.

revenue.description: Optional revenue for this trip, used in Vehicle ROI reporting.

tripId.description: ID of the trip this fuel log is associated with
ID of the trip this fuel log is associated with

vehicleId.description: ID of the vehicle this expense applies to
ID of the vehicle this expense applies to

totalDistanceKm.description: Sum of actualDistanceKm across completed trips

totalFuelLiters.description: Sum of liters across all fuel logs

fuelEfficiencyKmPerLiter.description: totalDistanceKm / totalFuelLiters; null when no fuel has been logged

totalRevenue.description: Sum of revenue across completed trips

roi.description: (totalRevenue - operationalCost) / acquisitionCost; null when acquisitionCost is 0
